---
title: "Teaching"
---

## Shih Chien University

**English Taught Program in International Business**

-   **Statistics I & II**, Undergraduate, Fall, 2024, 2025; Spring, 2025, 2026.

[Course site](https://yyliou.github.io/da/)

-   **Programming for Application**, Undergraduate, Spring, 2024, 2025, 2026.
-   **Data Analysis**, Undergraduate, Fall, 2024, 2025.

## Anonymous Feedback from My Students

> This semester, the course was a little more advanced compared to the previous semester, but the teacher tried his best to assist where we needed help, and I must say he's very good, and he knows his work.

> I think every lecturer has every way to deliver their material, but what I like the most is how the lecturer tries to wrap a hard material into an easy one. That is more helpful and helps me learn better. The lecturer english usage is good too, no comment from me.

> The most impactful part of this subject was the practical application of theoretical concepts. Using real-world case studies allowed me to see how the material functions outside of a textbook, which significantly boosted my engagement and retention.

> He is very good at what he does and knows it very well. Keep us updated about everything regarding the course and explain everything clearly.
